channel.title: Home on 我的博客
channel.description: Recent content in Home on 我的博客

item.title: Hugo Book Theme Review
item.description:
Hugo Book Theme Review#

Hugo Book is a clean, content-focused documentation theme.

Pros#

  • Clean Design: No distracting elements.
  • Markdown Friendly: Perfectly supports standard Markdown syntax.
  • Multilingual Support: Built-in i18n support.

Cons#

  • Custom styles require overriding SCSS variables.

Summary#

It is very suitable for technical documentation and personal knowledge bases.

item.title: Hugo Quick Start
item.description:
Hugo Quick Start Guide#

This tutorial will help you quickly start a Hugo site.

Install Hugo#

Install using Homebrew (macOS) or apt (Linux).

item.title: Python Basics Tutorial
item.description:
Python Basics Tutorial#

This tutorial will introduce the basics of the Python programming language.

Variables and Data Types#

Python supports various data types, including integers, floats, strings, and booleans.

Control Flow#

Learn how to use if-else statements and loop structures.

item.title: Python Advanced Tutorial
item.description:
Python Advanced Tutorial#

This tutorial will explore advanced features of Python in depth.

Functions and Modules#

Learn how to define functions and import and use modules.

Object-Oriented Programming#

Master the concepts of classes, objects, inheritance, and polymorphism.

item.title: First Post
item.description:
My First Blog Post#

This is my first article after building my blog with Hugo + GitHub Pages.

Setup Process#

  1. Initialize Hugo project
  2. Install hugo-book theme
  3. Configure GitHub Pages deployment
  4. Publish the first post

Tech Stack#

  • Static Site Generator: Hugo
  • Theme: hugo-book
  • Deployment Platform: GitHub Pages

I hope this blog can record my learning and growth journey!
